title: Rhythm: chat conversation flow
text: hey what time at 7 cool bring snacks ok which ones the spicy ones obvi sounds good see you then bye bye drive safe

tips.text: Real chat = short bursts, no punctuation

tips.target: hey what time at 7 cool bring snacks ok which ones the
spicy ones obvi sounds good see you then bye bye drive safe

character_tips.anna: Chat rhythm. Short bursts, no punctuation, full speed.
character_tips.maxim: Chat is the most-typed format of all. Master the rhythm.
character_tips.klavochka: Friends talking back and forth, my treasure 💕
